hymns.english_title: All Creatures of Our God and King
hymns.english_lyrics:
All creatures of our God and King,
Lift up your voice and with us sing,
O praise Him! Alleluia!
Thou burning sun with golden beam,
Thou silver moon with softer gleam!
O praise Him! O praise Him!
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Ade nyinaa a …õw…î Nyame panin,
Mom ma mo nne koraa so,
Mom kame! Halleluya!
Wosofo bi nti …îp…õn so,
Asase nti din din so,
Mom kame! Mom kame!
Halleluya! Halleluya! Halleluya!
hymns.author: William Henry Draper

hymns.english_lyrics:
He leadeth me, O blessed thought!
O words with heavenly comfort fraught!
Whate'er I do, where'er I be,
Still 'tis God's hand that leadeth me.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
∆Üde me k…î, O nk…îmm…îd…õ!
O ns…õm a …îda ak…îmfo ba!
Eny…õ d…õn na me y…õ, m…õko h…õn,
Na …îy…î me nsa na …îde me k…î.
hymns.author: Joseph Henry Gilmore

hymns.english_lyrics:
Amazing grace! How sweet the sound
That saved a wretch like me!
I once was lost, but now am found,
Was blind, but now I see.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
∆Ügyimfuo a …îp…õ me!
Edin a …õy…õ d…õ mma!
Menuu k…î, nanso mihu …îkwan,
Menya so, nanso mihu w…î!
hymns.author: John Newton

hymns.english_lyrics:
Jesus loves me, this I know,
For the Bible tells me so.
Little ones to Him belong;
They are weak, but He is strong.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Yesu do me, me nim yi,
Na OdwareŒµ no ka ayam.
Akokosini nyinaa nti,
W…îy…õ mmerante, nanso …îy…õ …îk…õse.
hymns.author: Anna Bartlett Warner

hymns.english_lyrics:
Jesus Christ is risen today,
Alleluia!
Our triumphant holy day,
Alleluia!
Who did once upon the cross
Suffer to redeem our loss.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Yesu Krist…î awoso…î …îkra,
Halleluya!
Y…õn nnwaho a …îp…õ y…õn,
Halleluya!
Onuak…î so na wax…õ y…õn.
Af…îre…õ na wasa y…õn.
hymns.author: Charles Wesley

hymns.english_title: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
hymns.english_lyrics:
What a friend we have in Jesus,
All our sins and griefs to bear!
What a privilege to carry
Everything to God in prayer!
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Yesu y…õ nnamfo a …îy…õ ade,
…îb…î…î y…õn b…îne nyinaa!
Ey…õ s…õ w…îboa y…õn,
S…õ w…îde y…õn as…õm nyinaa k…î Nyame.
hymns.author: Joseph Scriven

hymns.twi_lyrics:
Wo nnomsem y…õ k…õse, O Nyame Papa,
Wunka d…îm na wosaso…î;
Wo su nka hann,
Wo ayamye nka ase.
hymns.author: Thomas O. Chisholm

hymns.english_lyrics:
Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine!
O what a foretaste of glory divine!
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Savior all the day long.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Nkonimdi a …õy…õ d…õ, Yesu y…õ me de!
O, obi nk…îmm…î a …îy…õ soro!
Eyi y…õ me din, eyi y…õ me dwom,
Mom Yesu a …îgye me ak…îk…î.
hymns.author: Fanny J. Crosby

hymns.english_title: O Love That Wilt Not Let Me Go
hymns.english_lyrics:
O Love that wilt not let me go,
I rest my weary soul in Thee;
I give Thee back the life I owe,
That in Thine ocean depths it may be free.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
O do a …îmm…õ me k…î,
Me kra a …õy…õ d…õe de wo.
Me nkwa a memfa wo ma,
Fa me ak…î wo pont…î mu.
hymns.author: George Matheson

hymns.english_lyrics:
Praise God from whom all blessings flow,
Praise Him all creatures here below,
Praise Him above ye heavenly host,
Praise Father, Son, and Holy Ghost.
hymns.twi_lyrics:
Mom Nyame a ow…î ade nyinaa,
Mom no, ade nyinaa,
Mom no, …îsoro so,
Mom Papa, ∆Üba, ne Honhom Kronkron.
hymns.author: Thomas Ken
